## Testing checklist
- [ ] Tested on mobile (iPhone PWA or Vercel preview on phone)
- [ ] Looks correct in desktop browser

## Safe to merge?
- [ ] No broken links
- [ ] Wallet connect still works
- [ ] Shop link still goes to `shop.basefm.space`
- [ ] No secrets or private keys added to client-side code
- [ ] Any `dangerouslySetInnerHTML` sanitized with DOMPurify
- [ ] USDC amounts use 6 decimals, RAVE amounts use 18 decimals
